observations.interpretation: All five external-gate Gmail drafts plus the separate CTE confirmation draft are still present with Gmail DRAFT labels.
observations.caveat: Connector observation is a point-in-time mailbox check; rerun before claiming send/reply status.

observations.query_or_scope: in:sent newer_than:7d ("CD-A ERT transform" OR "CD-A Geoscope" OR "CD-A RH/suction" OR "CD-A Taupe" OR "CD-A historical permeability" OR "CD-A OGS CTE")
observations.interpretation: No sent copies of the gate-request or CTE draft subjects were found in the last seven days.
observations.caveat: Search is subject-limited to the generated draft subjects.

observations.query_or_scope: in:anywhere newer_than:7d (from:Gesa.Ziefle@bgr.de OR from:Markus.Furche@bgr.de OR from:Tuanny.Cajuhi@bgr.de) (CD-A OR CDA OR HERMES OR OGS OR ERT OR Taupe OR RH OR suction OR Geoscope OR permeability OR CTE)

observations.query_or_scope: in:anywhere newer_than:14d (teambeam OR "TeamBeam" OR "CD-A" OR CDA OR HERMES)
observations.interpretation: The recent CD-A/HERMES/TeamBeam context search returned only the six generated drafts, not new provider or TeamBeam messages.
observations.caveat: Search is broad but still a point-in-time Gmail connector query.

notes: This is a point-in-time Gmail connector check, not a mailbox automation.
No Gmail send/archive/delete/label operation is performed by this audit.
A zero result in the provider reply search is evidence for current triage, not proof that no reply can arrive later.
